data.title: CZ: There are rumors that a certain venture capital firm lobbied heavily against Binance
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News User @amansaiofficial asked CZ: "Did the Wall Street Journal WSJ ask you for money to stop defaming you?"
CZ responded: "I didn't ask for money to stop defaming you, but I heard that they took money to discredit us. There are rumors that a large venture capital firm that has invested in a US crypto exchange is lobbying heavily against 'Binance helps the United States become the capital of cryptocurrency'. They spent millions of dollars on 'lobbying activities'. This is a manifestation of fear of competition."

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee: Rate cuts still possible in next 10 to 16 months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Goolsbee: There is still a possibility of interest rate cuts in the next 10 to 16 months. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee Suggests Potential Rate Cuts Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Austan Goolsbee indicated that there is a possibility of interest rate cuts within the next 10 to 16 months. He highlighted that the current EU tariffs are significantly higher than usual, which could severely impact supply chains. Despite market volatility, Goolsbee maintains that the economy remains robust. He noted that if tariffs and uncertainties do not pose a threat to inflation, interest rates might eventually decrease.

data.title: Semler Scientific Invests $50 Million in Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description:
According to PANews, Semler Scientific, a medical technology company listed on Nasdaq under the code SMLR, disclosed in its latest 8-K filing that it acquired 455 bitcoins between May 13 and May 22, 2025, at an average price of $109,801 per bitcoin. As of May 22, the company holds a total of 4,264 bitcoins, with a total investment cost of $390 million and an average holding cost of $91,471 per bitcoin.

The filing reveals that the company raised $114.8 million through an ATM issuance plan, with a portion of the funds allocated for bitcoin investment. Semler Scientific's website now features a bitcoin holdings dashboard, displaying key metrics such as the year-to-date bitcoin yield of 25.8%. The funds for this bitcoin purchase were sourced from a stock issuance agreement previously signed with Barclays and five other investment banks.

data.title: High EU Tariffs Could Severely Impact Supply Chains, Says Fed's Goolsbee
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Austan Goolsbee has stated that a 50% tariff imposed by the European Union would significantly differ from the current situation. Such a high level of tariffs could severely disrupt supply chains.

data.title: Travala’s 2025 Data Shows Crypto Becoming a Mainstream Travel Payment Option
data.description:
TL;DR In 2024, Travala reached $80 million in bookings paid with cryptocurrencies, a 78% increase compared to the previous year. Nearly 80% of current bookings are paid in digital assets, with Binance Pay emerging as the most used external payment method, surpassing bank cards and Apple Pay. Crypto-using travelers spend more, stay longer, and show. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/travalas-2025-data-shows-crypto-becoming-a-mainstream-travel-payment-option/

data.title: The market plunge caused the whale James Wynn to lose more than $9.8 million in long positions, and only PEPE was profitable
OKX will soon launch SOPH (Sophon) spot trading
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will soon launch SOPH (Sophon) spot trading. It is reported that Sophon is a consumer-oriented entertainment blockchain that is built with ZK Stack and cooperates with applications in multiple fields.
The specific schedule is as follows:
SOPH open deposit time: 8:00 pm on May 23, 2025 (UTC+8)
SOPH call auction time: 8:00 to 9:00 pm on May 28, 2025 (UTC+8)
SOPH/USDT spot trading opening time: 9:00 pm on May 28, 2025 (UTC+8)
SOPH open withdrawal time: 11:00 pm on May 28, 2025 (UTC+8)

data.title: Nasdaq Futures Decline as Dow and S&P 500 Experience Losses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Nasdaq futures have seen a significant drop, expanding to a 2% decline. Meanwhile, futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 have also decreased, each falling by 1.6%. This development reflects ongoing volatility in the financial markets.

data.title: EU Commission Withholds Comment on U.S. Trade Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the European Commission has decided not to comment on U.S. trade tariffs. This decision will remain in place until a conversation occurs between the EU Trade Commissioner and the U.S. Trade Representative. The move comes amid ongoing discussions and negotiations between the two parties regarding trade policies and tariffs.
